closure_note: Executed as a bounded post-017 technical-authority decision lane. The decision is publication-first: Packet 017 passed the second bounded host-side documentation/planning trial, but left exactly one unpublished host-created Packet 017 handoff artifact on `/home/olares/code/apex`; read-only evidence confirmed the prepared host mirror remains on `clean-main` at `8be69f166a0ac738304d178e9443166852e4ee7f` with only that untracked artifact, whose SHA-256 matches the workstation copy. The old clone remained untouched at `2836a2622309b4e146ca24f23b5bf87312c0c857` with dirty/untracked count `30`. Two bounded trials support a later readiness reassessment, but not before publication hygiene is restored. No migration, runtime mutation, publication execution, readiness-reassessment execution, AI-services work, Gitea/code-hosting work, canonical-hosting change, remote rewrite, force, reset, clean, or old-clone mutation occurred.
